title: NY Magazine Argues Brooklyn Beckham Family Rift Tied to In-Laws’ Billions: “The Peltzes Are So Rich They Can Just Pay for it All”
summary: A feature about the relationship between the wayward son of David and Victoria Beckham and Nelson Peltz's daughter Nicola and their influential families speculates on the reasons for the split between Brooklyn and his parents.

title: NASA Artemis II photo captures moon eclipse of sun — 'Absolutely stunning'
summary: Artemis II is returning home after breaking the record for the farthest distance traveled by humans from Earth and setting the stage for a manned lunar landing.
